'''Ainvar ul-Esca''' was a famous [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] during the time proceeding the [[Ruusan Reformations/Legends|Ruusan Reformation]] and the sweeping changes within the Order. Unlike the bulk of the Order's members, Mar was trained aboard the mobile training academy called the ''[[Chu'unthor]]'' and attained knighthood aboard the vessel. Traveling between the stars on an eternal journey mission, Mar gained notoriety on the [[HoloNet/Legends|HoloNet]] for many famous deeds.<ref name="POTJ" />
